steps.title: Protect the first-place status
steps.content: The sentence says Ederle and Rutkiewicz are permanently remembered as the first women to accomplish their feats. The blank must mean that no future person can replace them in that historical position.

steps.title: Reject unrelated actions
steps.content: Choice A means to specify as a condition. Choice B means to cause or persuade. Choice D means to bring about. None means to take someone's place. The remaining word means to displace or replace. The answer is C.
